items.title: Musk v. Altman Evidence Shows What Microsoft Executives Thought of OpenAI
items.summary: Leaders at the tech giant were skeptical of OpenAI—but wary of pushing it into the arms of Amazon, according to emails dating back to 2018.
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.

items.title: Instagram privacy tech is turned off today- what does this mean for your DMs?
items.summary: The platform said it would remove end-to-end encrypted messages, a major U‑turn by parent company Meta.
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.

items.title: Twitch has new penalties for streamers caught viewbotting, CEO says
items.summary: Repeat offenders will be punished with "caps" on their views.
